cards.front: What is the purpose of Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)?
cards.back: To summarize and describe the main features of the data

cards.front: What is the main goal of dimensionality reduction?
cards.back: To reduce the number of features in a dataset while retaining most of the information

cards.front: What is the difference between feature scaling and normalization?
cards.back: Feature scaling is used to scale both positive and negative values, while normalization scales all values to a common range

cards.front: What is the purpose of data visualization in EDA?
cards.back: To represent data in a graphical format to gain insights and understand patterns

cards.front: What is correlation analysis in EDA?
cards.back: To measure the strength of the linear relationship between two continuous variables
